title: Netherrack Diamond Ore
description: This mod adds netherrack diamond ores in the nether
body:
# Netherrack Diamond Ore
This mod adds netherrack diamond ores in the nether

Info:

- Generation:
  - Y level 6 to 119
  - Only in the Nether Waste Biome
- Item:
  - Diamonds only drop if mined by a iron pickaxe or better
  - Fortunable
  - Hardness: 0.5
  - Blast Resistance: 10
  - Rarity: Uncommon
  - Max stack size: 64
